definition:
1. a glory, delight, honour , (Iliad by Homer), attic; ἀγάλματ᾽ ἀγορᾶς mere ornaments  of the agora, (Euripides) 
2. a pleasing gift , especially for the gods, (Odyssey by Homer) 
3. a statue in honour of a god , (Herdotus Historicus), attic; an image , as an object of worship, etc., (Aeschulus Tragicus); then generally,= ἀνδριάς, any statue , (Plato Philosophus): also a portrait, picture , ἐξαλειφθεῖς᾽ ὡς ἄγαλμα (Euripides) (ML)
